text_template: Support for the show comes from Trust and Will. A death in a family can flip your world upside down. And the last thing you want to deal with during it all is confusing paperwork and tough legal decisions. Estate planning can take away some of that anxiety and Trust & Will says they can help you create an estate planning that covers child and pet guardianship, asset distribution, and healthcare directives. Trust & Will offers affordable attorney designed estate plans that you can create in as little as 30 minutes. You'll have access to attorney support as an add-on to your plan and you can easily update your plan at every life stage or transition. That's because Trust & Will's platform keeps everything organized, updated and ready so your loved ones never face the burden alone. Trust & Will, affordable estate plans, priceless peace of mind. Go to trustandwill.com slash today and get 20% off. That's trustandwill.com slash today to get your 20% off. Trustandwill.com slash today.
